note: This is the only backlog file. All previously separate scope docs are consolidated here.
coding_branch_rules: Use only docs/product/backlog.json as the backlog source of truth.
Pick the highest priority TODO task from the current release unless instructed otherwise.
Set status to IN_PROGRESS before starting implementation.
Move task to CODE_REVIEW or READY_FOR_QA when implementation is complete.
Set DONE only after acceptance criteria and definition_of_done are satisfied.
If new work is discovered, add a new TODO story under the correct epic.
If implementation differs from requirement, add implementation_notes instead of silently changing acceptance criteria.

stories.title: Android TV project setup
stories.description: Build native Android TV APK for Mi Box S / Android TV / Smart Box.

stories.title: Remote-first navigation
stories.description: Make all core screens usable with Android TV remote.
acceptance_criteria: Long press does not break navigation

stories.title: Home screen skeleton
stories.description: Create home screen with key TV sections.

stories.title: Premium dark TV design system
stories.description: Make the app look like a premium streaming product, not a technical utility.

stories.title: First launch onboarding
stories.description: Explain setup to a non-technical user on first launch.

stories.title: Global loading, empty, error and retry states
stories.description: Every major screen should have clear states.
acceptance_criteria: No technical stack traces shown to user
definition_of_done: States verified on home/search/detail/settings/player where relevant

stories.title: Mock catalog
stories.description: Create offline mock catalog for UI and player testing.

stories.title: Search screen
stories.description: Search movies and series by title.
acceptance_criteria: Slow sources do not freeze UI
definition_of_done: Search works with mock and source data

stories.title: Unified search results and normalization
stories.description: Show unified search results from enabled sources.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicate results are grouped or ranked
Broken source does not break all search
definition_of_done: Multiple sources can return results safely

stories.title: Search filters and voice search
stories.description: Add filters and Android TV voice input.
acceptance_criteria: Voice search via Android TV system input works

stories.title: Movie detail page
stories.description: Show rich movie detail page before playback.
acceptance_criteria: Shows actors and director where available
Missing metadata does not break layout
definition_of_done: Detail page works from mock and search results

stories.title: Series detail page with seasons and episodes
stories.description: Support seasons, episodes and watched state.
acceptance_criteria: Episode description/release date shown where available

stories.title: Actors, filmography and trailers
stories.description: Add actor pages and trailer playback.
acceptance_criteria: Actor list visible on detail page
Trailer plays or shows graceful missing state

stories.title: Manual source management
stories.description: User can add, edit, enable, disable and delete sources.
definition_of_done: One broken source does not crash app

stories.title: TXT source import
stories.description: Import user-controlled sources from simple .txt file, one source per line.
definition_of_done: Bad file does not crash app

stories.title: SourceAdapter architecture
stories.description: Create source adapter contract for search/details/streams/health checks.
definition_of_done: One broken source cannot crash global search

stories.title: Source diagnostics and test mode
stories.description: Add health checks, parser diagnostics and separate test mode.
acceptance_criteria: Raw response visible in developer mode
Test mode separated from production sources
definition_of_done: Test sources do not pollute normal catalog

stories.title: Legal-safe source architecture
stories.description: Keep source system user-controlled and legally safe.
acceptance_criteria: No pirated/copyrighted sources bundled in APK
Example source file has placeholders only
App does not depend on prohibited built-in sources

stories.title: Embedded player
stories.description: Play video inside Asgard TV.
acceptance_criteria: Player error does not crash app

stories.title: Timeline seek and timecode navigation
stories.description: Support seeking and visible timecode.
acceptance_criteria: Seek does not crash when duration unknown

stories.title: Continue watching
stories.description: Save and resume playback progress.

stories.title: Quality, subtitles and audio tracks
stories.description: Support quality, subtitles and audio selection.

stories.title: External player fallback
stories.description: Allow opening video in external player if embedded player fails.
acceptance_criteria: Friendly message if external player missing

stories.title: QR import from phone
stories.description: Import source list or links from phone by scanning QR on TV.
acceptance_criteria: User can paste TXT file link

stories.title: QR security
stories.description: Secure QR import session.
definition_of_done: Unauthorized import cannot be applied without TV confirmation

stories.title: AI summary without spoilers
stories.description: Show short AI summary on detail page.
acceptance_criteria: AI block can be hidden if unavailable
definition_of_done: AI failure does not break app

stories.title: Why you may like this
stories.description: Explain why selected title may fit user taste.

stories.title: AI movie picker
stories.description: Suggest what to watch by mood.
acceptance_criteria: Mood options include light/funny/action/thriller/family/smart/mystery/series tonight/movie under beer/something short
Can open title card from suggestion

stories.title: New episodes and upcoming releases
stories.description: Track watched series and show upcoming content.
acceptance_criteria: Upcoming releases can be added to Watchlist

stories.title: AI settings and provider configuration
stories.description: Allow AI enable/disable and provider/API key settings.
definition_of_done: App works with AI disabled or unavailable

stories.title: Favorites
stories.description: Save and manage favorite titles.
definition_of_done: Favorites work from detail page and list

stories.title: Watchlist
stories.description: Save titles for later.

stories.title: Viewing history
stories.description: Track watched movies and episodes.
definition_of_done: History persists and can be cleared

stories.title: Profiles and child profile foundation
stories.description: Support separate profiles later.
definition_of_done: Profile data separation does not break current single-user mode

stories.title: Magnet link input
stories.description: Allow user-provided legal magnet links to be pasted or imported through QR import.
acceptance_criteria: QR import can receive magnet link
App does not crash if metadata fails
definition_of_done: Invalid/dead magnet does not crash app

stories.title: Torrent file input
stories.description: Allow user-provided legal .torrent files to be opened/imported and parsed.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid torrent file shows clear error
Import works through local picker or phone bridge where possible
Malformed file does not crash app

stories.title: Torrent metadata and file selection
stories.description: Show torrent metadata and let user choose playable video file from single-file or multi-file torrent.
definition_of_done: Non-video files not selected by default

stories.title: Streaming-first torrent playback
stories.description: Start playback before full torrent download when enough buffer is available.
acceptance_criteria: Engine supports sequential/streaming mode or limitation documented
Player starts after enough initial buffer
UI does not freeze while downloading
definition_of_done: Playback works for supported legal/test torrents
No crash on no peers or slow peers

stories.title: Torrent player integration and seeking
stories.description: Integrate torrent playback with embedded Asgard TV player and handle seek limitations safely.
acceptance_criteria: Torrent stream opens in embedded player
Timeline works where buffered/downloaded range supports it
Continue Watching works where technically possible
definition_of_done: Torrent playback uses same player UX
Seek failure does not crash app

stories.title: Torrent buffer, cache and diagnostics
stories.description: Show torrent progress, manage cache/storage and provide diagnostics for failures.
acceptance_criteria: Shows download speed and buffer progress
Diagnostics show invalid magnet, metadata timeout, no peers, unsupported codec, storage error and player error

stories.title: Settings sections
stories.description: Create full settings structure.
definition_of_done: All settings sections work with remote

stories.title: Backup export and import settings
stories.description: Allow user to export/import settings.
definition_of_done: Bad backup file does not crash app

stories.title: Privacy and secure API key storage
stories.description: Protect user privacy and secrets.
acceptance_criteria: API key not exported without explicit confirmation
definition_of_done: Logs and exports do not leak API keys

stories.title: Diagnostics screen
stories.description: Show diagnostics for app, network, sources, AI and player.
definition_of_done: Diagnostics can rerun and does not crash

stories.title: Logs export and developer mode
stories.description: Support logs export and technical diagnostics.
acceptance_criteria: Developer mode shows source ID/response time/parser status/stream status/player error/raw and normalized parser output

stories.title: Smoke test and Mi Box S validation
stories.description: Create and pass release smoke checks.

stories.title: Release APK packaging
stories.description: Produce ready installable APK for non-technical user.
acceptance_criteria: APK can install on Mi Box S

stories.title: Simple installation and update guide
stories.description: Write simple guide for non-programmer.
definition_of_done: Guide is understandable without programming knowledge

definition_of_good: Torrent/magnet legal user-provided playback works or limitations are documented
Source errors do not crash the app
Non-programmer can install and configure it
definition_of_stable_1_0: Mi Box S or Android TV physical validation passed
No broken update path that deletes user data
